title: School of Engineering faculty member earns NSF CAREER Award for advancing sustainable plastics solutions
summary_en: Ana Morais, assistant professor of chemical & petroleum engineering, received the prestigious award for research focused on improving how difficult-to-recycle plastics can be converted into useful products while advancing broader sustainability efforts through education and outreach.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学工程学院教师获国家科学基金会早期职业奖 推进可持续塑料解决方案研究

title: Restrictions on emigration equally important as immigration in shaping European borders, research finds
summary_en: In a new article, Erik Scott, the John P. Black Professor of History at the University of Kansas, challenges the traditional focus on immigration to look at how restrictions on emigration have helped define the borders of Central and Eastern Europe since the 19th century.
title_cn: 研究指出出境限制与入境管控对塑造欧洲边界具有同等重要性
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学约翰·P·布莱克历史学教授埃里克·斯科特（Erik Scott）于近日发表研究论文，指出对出境限制的考察与对移民问题的研究同样重要，二者共同塑造了中欧和东欧地区的边界形态。该论文题为《19世纪以来中东欧的非法出境》，已由牛津大学出版社收录于《牛津移民研究百科全书》。斯科特教授认为，公众通常将公民身份与移民问题相联系，但公民身份所涉及的归属权与权利范畴同样取决于出境权，即个人离开国家的自由。

title: Former dean Lorraine Haricombe to speak on libraries and digital scholarship
summary_en: The University of Kansas Libraries will welcome former dean and international library leader Lorraine Haricombe as the next guest in its “Global Conversations in Librarianship” series.
title_cn: Former dean Lorraine Haricombe to speak on libraries and digital scholarship

title: Public invited May 15 to open house for KU-designed supportive housing project in Lawrence
summary_en: Students in KU’s School of Architecture & Design designed and built Kaw House, an innovative supportive housing project in Lawrence. The high-performance home demonstrates new approaches to sustainability, construction and community impact. The public is invited to an open house and ribbon cutting May 15.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学设计支持性住房项目“卡瓦之家”将于5月15日举办公众开放日活动
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学“泥土工坊”工作室设计并建造的“卡瓦之家”支持性住房项目，定于5月15日举办公众开放日活动，邀请社会各界人士参观竣工项目。该项目由堪萨斯大学与“租户变房主”组织合作开发，旨在为脱离无家可归状态的个人提供有尊严、促进康复的居住空间，体现了精心设计、先进木结构施工及社区协作的有机结合。

title: Study finds people more cynical toward news more likely to believe misinformation
summary_en: A study led by the University of Kansas explored news skepticism, news trust and misinformation. Results showed people with more news knowledge had more news skepticism, but those with more news cynicism were more likely to believe misinformation. The results can help improve media literacy and fight misinformation, the authors said.
title_cn: 研究表明对新闻持愤世嫉俗态度者更易相信错误信息
summary_cn: 美国堪萨斯大学最新研究考察了新闻怀疑论的概念，并将其与新闻愤世嫉俗和新闻信任加以区分。研究团队对逾1000名受访者进行了调查，以评估其新闻知识水平、新闻怀疑程度、信任程度及愤世嫉俗程度，并衡量其相信有关新冠疫情与政治议题错误信息的可能性。研究结果显示，新闻知识水平较高的个体表现出较高的新闻怀疑度，但新闻愤世嫉俗度较低；而新闻愤世嫉俗度较高的个体则更倾向于相信错误信息。该研究由堪萨斯大学新闻与大众传播学助理教授塔玛·威尔纳共同执笔，发表于《大众传播与社会》期刊。

title: Airborne electromagnetic survey of Ogallala aquifer conditions planned in southwest Kansas
summary_en: Beginning in late May and continuing until late July, residents of southwest Kansas may see a low-flying helicopter towing a large hexagonal frame. This aerial arrangement is part of a project to map groundwater conditions in the Ogallala aquifer in Southwest Kansas Groundwater Management District (GMD) 3.
title_cn: 堪萨斯州西南部计划开展奥加拉拉含水层航空电磁调查
summary_cn: 自五月底至七月底，堪萨斯州西南部居民可能观察到一架低空飞行的直升机拖曳大型六边形框架。该空中作业隶属于西南堪萨斯地下水管理区第三区奥加拉拉含水层地下水状况测绘项目。项目由西南堪萨斯地下水管理区第三区、堪萨斯地质调查局与怀俄明州拉勒米堡的水文地质框架有限责任公司共同规划，旨在加深对奥加拉拉含水层的认知。

title: Study reveals common mutation linked to autoimmune diseases may protect people from viral infections
summary_en: New research from the University of Kansas shows a “risk gene” linked to higher odds of developing autoimmune diseases such as diabetes or lupus may also provide a survival advantage fighting viral infections like coronavirus.
title_cn: 研究揭示与自身免疫疾病相关的常见基因突变或可保护机体免受病毒感染
summary_cn: 美国堪萨斯大学最新研究显示，一种被确认为增加糖尿病或狼疮等自身免疫性疾病患病风险的“风险基因”，同时可能为机体抗击冠状病毒等病毒感染提供生存优势。该研究聚焦于名为PTPN22的基因，其携带的1858C>T（R620W）突变存在于北美地区约十分之一的人群中。相关成果已于近期发表于《美国国家科学院院刊》。

title: Scholar sketches a Jewish economic theology
summary_en: A University of Kansas religious studies scholar has written a new chapter on Jewish economic theology for the St. Andrews Encyclopaedia of Theology. Samuel Brody starts with the biblical injunction against lending money at interest and sketches historical Jewish highlights stretching from the rabbis of the Talmud to the medieval sage Maimonides to Karl Marx.
title_cn: Scholar sketches a Jewish economic theology
